title: Understand the definition of Personal Data
summary: Personal Data is data about an identified or identifiable natural person. Personal Data Protection is the overall effort to protect Personal Data throughout the processing process.
focus: Understand the difference between Personal Data and Specific Personal Data
Get to know the role of Personal Data Controllers and Processors
Understand the rights and obligations of Personal Data Subjects
reporting: Dasar pemahaman untuk seluruh implementasi UU PDP
analogy: The PDP Law is like the rules of the game in a community - before you can play correctly, everyone needs to understand the basic definitions. Personal Data is like our 'identity' in the digital world. Without a clear definition, it is difficult to apply the rules.

roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Encrypt customer databases (at rest and in transit) and implement role-based access.
roleTranslations.board: Board Mode: Appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO) to ensure the company is not fined.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Update the Privacy Policy and ensure there is a valid consent mechanism.
roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Understand the definition of Personal Data'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

title: Understand the principles of personal data protection
summary: The PDP Law is based on 8 principles: protection, legal certainty, public interest, benefit, prudence, balance, accountability and confidentiality.
focus: Implementation of the principle of protection in every processing activity
Guarantee legal certainty in every action
Balance business interests with individual rights
reporting: Dasar evaluasi kepatuhan seluruh aktivitas PDP
analogy: These eight principles are like navigation compass stars - every data processing journey must always refer to these eight directions. Without a compass, the ship went astray. With clear principles, every data processing decision has a clear direction.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Understand the principles of personal data protection'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit to 'Understand the principles of personal data protection'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations to 'Understand the principles of personal data protection'.

title: Identification of Specific Personal Data
summary: Specific Personal Data includes: health data, biometrics, genetics, criminal records, child data and personal financial data that require extra protection.
focus: Inventory and classify sensitive data
Apply tighter controls to specific data
Document the processing basis for each category
analogy: Specific data is like valuables in a safe - it requires special handling compared to ordinary items. Health or biometric data is more sensitive than full names, so requires a higher level of protection. Like treating diamonds differently from iron.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Identification of Specific Personal Data'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Identification of Specific Personal Data'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'Identification of Specific Personal Data'.

title: General Personal Data Identification
summary: General Personal Data includes: full name, gender, nationality, religion, marital status and data combined for identification.
focus: Identify common data in the system
Understand that combinations of general data can become specific
Define basic controls for common data
analogy: General data is like basic building blocks - on its own it may not be dangerous, but combined with others it can become something powerful. Mobile number + email address + full name can be enough for unique identification. You need to remain alert even though it looks 'normal'.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'General Personal Data Identification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'General Personal Data Identification'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'General Personal Data Identification'.

title: Realize the right to information and transparency
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to obtain information about the clarity of the identity of the requester, the basis of legal interest, the purpose of use, and the accountability of the requesting party.
focus: Provide clear information when collecting data
Transparently explain the purpose of processing
Document the legal basis for processing
analogy: Transparency is like nutrition labels on food - consumers have the right to know what they are 'consuming'. Organizations must be honest about what is being taken, for what purpose, and who is accessing it. Without labels, trust will not exist.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Making information rights and transparency a reality'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Realize information rights and transparency'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Realize the right to information and transparency'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Realize the right to correction and update
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to complete, update and correct errors or inaccuracies in data within 3x24 hours.
focus: Build an easy correction request mechanism
Verify requests securely
Meet the 3x24 hour deadline
analogy: Data correction is like servicing a vehicle - if something is damaged or worn, it must be repaired immediately to keep it running well. Inaccurate data can lead to wrong decisions, much like GPS showing an incorrect location.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Realize correction and update rights'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Realize correction and update rights'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Realize the right to correction and update'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Realize access rights and portability
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to obtain access, data copy and data portability in a format that can be read by electronic systems.
focus: Provide a data access request mechanism
Provide data in a useful format
Document all access granted
analogy: Data access is like going to a safe deposit box - the owner has full rights to enter and take what he has at any time. Banks may not deny legitimate access, but can verify identity first. Data 'belongs' to the subject, not the organization.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Make access rights and portability a reality'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Make access privileges and portability possible'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Make access rights and portability a reality'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Exercise the right to erasure and destruction
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to end processing, delete or destroy their personal data in accordance with statutory regulations.
cadence: Saat permintaan atau masa retensi berakhir
focus: Set a clear retention schedule
Create a secure deletion procedure
Verify the deletion is complete
analogy: Data deletion is like an office document shredder - once it is no longer useful, it must be shredded properly, not just thrown in the trash. This prevents 'identity theft' or misuse of data that is no longer relevant.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Realize the right of erasure and destruction'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Realize deletion and destruction rights'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Realize the right to erasure and destruction'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Implement the right to withdraw consent
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to withdraw the data processing consent that has been given. Termination is carried out no later than 3x24 hours.
focus: Create an easy withdrawal mechanism
Respect unconditional withdrawal of consent
Perform related deletion after withdrawal
analogy: Withdrawing consent is like canceling an unsubscribe - once cancelled, the company may not continue to send emails or use data for that purpose. easy to withdraw is important for trust.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Realize the right to withdraw consent'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Realize the right to withdraw consent'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Realize the right to withdraw consent'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Realize the right to object and limit
summary: Personal Data Subjects have the right to object to automated decisions and to delay or limit processing proportionally.
cadence: Saat ada keputusan otomatis atau permintaan
focus: Identify automated decision-making systems
Create a clear objection mechanism
Review automated decisions manually if necessary
analogy: Objecting to an automated decision is like appealing to a judge after an AI verdict - even if the technology decides, humans still have the right to ask for a review. The machine's decision should not be absolute without the option of appeal.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Realize the right of objection and restriction'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Realize the right of objection and restriction'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Realize the right of objection and restriction'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Comply with lawful processing principles
summary: Data processing must be carried out in a limited, specific, lawful, transparent, purposeful, accurate and responsible manner.
focus: Make sure there is a legal basis for any processing
Collect only necessary data
Document all processing activities
analogy: The processing principle is like medical ethics - the patient must consent, the doctor must explain, and only perform necessary actions. Informed consent is not just a signature, but a full understanding of what will be done.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Comply with lawful processing principles'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Comply with lawful processing principles'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Comply with lawful processing principles'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Manage approvals properly
summary: Consent must be explicit, informed, unambiguous, and revocable. Consent that does not meet the requirements is declared null and void by law.
focus: Consent design is clear and in simple language
Separate consent for different purposes
Provide an easy withdrawal mechanism
analogy: A good consent is like a signature on a contract that is clearly legible - not detailed print that cannot be read. If people don't really understand what is being agreed to, that consent can be void. Organizations must invest in clarity.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Manage approvals right'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Manage approvals properly'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Manage approvals properly'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Protect data on children and vulnerable groups
summary: Processing of data of children and persons with disabilities must be carried out specifically with appropriate consent.
cadence: Saat memproses data minor atau disabilitas
focus: Verify age before processing child data
Get parent/guardian approval
Implement restricted access for sensitive data
analogy: Protecting children's data is like parental control rules on smartTVs - parents must be aware of and approve of the content their children consume. Children cannot give full consent because they are not old enough to understand the implications.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Protect data of children and vulnerable groups'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit to 'Protect data of children and vulnerable groups'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Protect data of children and vulnerable groups'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Have a lawful basis for processing
summary: Personal Data Controllers are required to have a basis for processing which includes consent, agreement, law, vital interests, public duties, or other legitimate interests.
focus: Identify and document the basis for processing
Choose the most appropriate basis for each activity
Periodic review of basic eligibility
evidence: Periodic legal review of the basis
analogy: The basis for processing is like the 'reason for entry' at reception - cannot enter without a clear reason. Consumers, contracts, laws, or vital interests – one or the other must be present. Without this, processing is invalid.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Have a lawful basis for processing'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Have a valid processing basis'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Have a lawful basis for processing'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Conduct a PDP impact assessment
summary: Personal Data Controllers are required to carry out an impact assessment (DPIA) when processing has a potentially high risk to the data subject.
focus: Identify the processing that requires DPIA
Carry out a comprehensive risk assessment
Implement necessary mitigations
analogy: DPIA is like an environmental impact assessment before development - you cannot just start a project that could have a big impact. High risk = requires deeper study before proceeding.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Perform a PDP impact assessment'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Perform PDP impact assessment'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations to 'Perform a PDP impact assessment'.

title: Protect personal data security
summary: Personal Data Controllers are required to protect data with operational technical measures and determine the level of security according to data risk.
focus: Implement encryption and access control
Monitor and detect threats
Set a security baseline according to risk level
analogy: Data security is like a bank safe - not one lock, but multiple layers. Digital vaults need encryption as steel, access control as the key, and monitoring as CCTV. The level of security must match the contents of the safe.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Protect personal data security'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit to 'Protect personal data security'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations to 'Protect the security of personal data'.

title: Record all processing activities
summary: Personal Data Controllers are required to record all processing activities for audit trail and accountability.
focus: Implement comprehensive logging
Save logs with secure storage
Ensure traceability from collection to deletion
analogy: Recording processing is like CCTV in a shop - not to monitor everyone, but to be able to trace if a problem occurs. With records, you can prove what happened and who did what.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'Recorder of all processing activities'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Recording of all processing activities'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Recorder of all processing activities'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Data breach notification
summary: In the event of data protection failure, the Controller is obliged to notify the data subject and institution within 3x24 hours.
focus: Build an incident response plan
Define escalation and notification procedures
Train the team for rapid response
analogy: A breach notification is like a medical emergency - if someone is injured, someone must know immediately and be able to help. Delays can be fatal. Same with data breach - subjects need to know as quickly as possible so they can take steps to protect themselves.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Prioritize budget allocation and strategic approval for 'Data breach notification'. Make sure the security ROI is clear.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Data breach notification'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Data breach notification' within the time limit according to the regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Appoint a DPO/PDP officer
summary: Personal Data Controllers are required to appoint PDP officials or officers in certain conditions such as public services or large-scale processing.
focus: Evaluate the need for appointment of a DPO
Select candidates with the right qualifications
Provide sufficient independence and resources
evidence: Decree on the appointment of DPO/PDP officers
analogy: A DPO is like a compliance officer in a company - someone whose job is to ensure everything goes according to the rules. He needs access to management, independence, and cannot be intervened. Without this, compliance becomes a window.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Appoint DPO/PDP officers'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Appoint DPO/PDP officer'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'Appoint DPO/PDP officer'.

title: Manage domestic data transfers
summary: Data transfer within Indonesian territory must be carried out with PDP protection in accordance with the law. Both parties are responsible.
focus: Document all data transfers
Make sure there is a data processing agreement
Monitor recipient compliance
analogy: Domestic data transfer is like sending a package via JNE - the package remains domestic, but still requires a receipt and can be tracked. You can't just send it without knowing where the data will go.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Manage domestic data transfer'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Manage domestic data transfer'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Manage domestic data transfer'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Manage overseas data transfers
summary: Transfers out of Indonesia must ensure that the destination country has equivalent or higher protection, or that there are adequate safeguards.
focus: Assess the level of protection of the destination country
Implement safeguards if necessary
Document the legal basis for the transfer
analogy: Cross-border transfers are like sending a package abroad - there are customs, customs regulations, and if the destination country is not safe, you need extra insurance. Data leaving Indonesia needs protection that cannot be lower than that within the country.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Manage overseas data transfers'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Manage overseas data transfer'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Manage overseas data transfer'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Understand administrative sanctions
summary: Violations of PDP provisions are subject to administrative sanctions: written warning, temporary suspension, deletion/destruction, and/or a fine of up to 2% of annual income.
focus: Understand the list of violations and sanctions
Implement compliance program
Carry out regular self-assessments
analogy: Administrative sanctions are like traffic tickets - not a serious crime, but still serious. A fine of 2% of revenue is significant for large companies. It is better to comply than to be punished.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Understand administrative sanctions'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Understand administrative sanctions'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Understand administrative sanctions'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Understand the role of PDP institutions
summary: PDP institutions appointed by the President carry out policy formulation, supervision, administrative law enforcement and facilitation of dispute resolution.
focus: Understand the authority of the supervisory agency
Prepare yourself for an audit or inspection
Take advantage of dispute resolution mechanisms
analogy: PDP institutions are like special cyber police - those who guard the rules of the game in the world of data. They can audit, fine, even stop operations if they violate it. Just like companies are required to comply with Ministry of Transportation regulations.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Understand the role of PDP institutions'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Understand the role of the PDP institution'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations to 'Understand the role of PDP institutions'.

title: Understand dispute resolution mechanisms
summary: PDP dispute resolution can be through arbitration, court, or alternative dispute resolution institutions in accordance with statutory provisions.
focus: Understand the available resolution options
Prepare documentation for defense
Consider alternative dispute resolution
analogy: Dispute resolution is like normal legal channels - it can be through mediation, arbitration or court. But it's best not to let the conflict go there. Prevention is better than cure.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Understand dispute resolution mechanisms'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Understand the dispute resolution mechanism'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Understand dispute resolution mechanisms'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Understand the criminal provisions
summary: PDP criminal violations include: obtaining/collecting (5 years/Rp. 5M), disclosing (4 years/Rp. 4M), using (5 years/Rp. 5M), falsifying (6 years/Rp. 6M).
focus: Educate employees about criminal provisions
Implementation of controls to prevent violations
Perform due diligence on third parties
analogy: Criminal provisions are like an ultimatum - companies can get fines, but individuals can go to prison. This is serious. It's not just a matter of money, but you can lose your freedom. So prevention must be strict.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Prioritize budget allocation and strategic approval to 'Understand criminal provisions'. Make sure the security ROI is clear.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Understand the criminal provisions'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Understand criminal provisions'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Adaptation to the PDP Law
summary: Personal Data Controllers and Processors are required to comply with the PDP Law no later than 2 years after its promulgation (October 2022).
focus: Carry out a gap assessment
Create a compliance roadmap
Implement needed changes
analogy: Adapting the PDP Law is like preparing for an exam - the October 2024 deadline is like 'assignment submission deadline'. Those who do not submit will be subject to sanctions. The faster you get there, the more ready you are.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Adaptation to the PDP Law'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Adaptation to the PDP Law'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'Adaptation to the PDP Law'.
